title: Eating Animations Aether Compatibility
description: Add compatibility between Eating Animations and the food of the mod Aether and variants of some other Aether theme mod
body: **Bundle Texture Pack Compat** [**Eating Animations More Mod Compatibility (FORGE/FABRIC)**](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/eating-animation-more-mod-compatibility) ### Eating Animations More Mod Compatibility **Add compatibility for mods with [Eating animation(FORGE/FABRIC)](https://modrinth.com/mod/eating-animation)** ### Mod Compatibility & Fixes: - [**Aether**](https://modrinth.com/mod/aether) - [**Aether Delight**](https://modrinth.com/mod/the-aethers-delight) ![Example](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4246a2f8c22860748f91bac07c96738a6ea569a9.gif) ![a](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/60c394a0032d2f6163fd6b9fd026bd518b9b2261.png)
